creator: t.linneweh@atc.co.at
text:
see misc/16003

sysinstall crashes, while configuring a network card via DHCP and there
are 2 gateways.

Bug occured also on 4.0 RELEASE.

I 've got a core-file, if anyone's interested, but i am not that good
in c to fix it myself.

The Bug has been in PR-DB for nearly a year now...:-(

Fix: 

Don't use DHCP....or change DHCP configuration
How-To-Repeat: Configure Network Card via DHCP, step through the fields of the mask.
